100.desc: A warrior that fights with his bare hands.

101.desc: Soaring over its enemies on wings of crimson fire, this monster attacks by blasting flames from its body.

102.desc: A shadow mask created by the hands of a dark mage.

103.desc: An indestructible, wicked mirror that blocks enemy attacks.

104.desc: A curtain woven by the hands of a sorcerer. It is said to enhance the power of magic- users.

105.desc: A deceivingly small creature that is so vicious it attacks both friend and foe without discretion.

106.desc: A spirit of the wind that freely sails the skies. Known to generate storms when it's in a bad mood.

107.desc: Uses both its physical and shadow forms to attack, making it a difficult creature to overcome.

108.desc: A final resting place that enhances the power of the doomed and drains that of the living.

109.desc: A goddess with an all-seeing eye that reveals all.

110.desc: A samurai from the Far East armed with a razor-sharp sword.

111.desc: This angel rules over the doomed and administers it when necessary.

112.desc: A vile monster that fuels its power by draining the essence of life from its opponents.

113.desc: Entirely gray, this beast has rarely been seen by mortal eyes.

114.desc: A gentleman thief that eludes the law despite the fact that he sticks out like a sore thumb with his silk hat and white cape.

115.desc: A magic-user that controls chaos and wields a mighty sickle.

116.desc: A very toxic creature that induces nightmares and attacks its victims with four poison- tipped stingers.

117.desc: A spirit of the books with infinite knowledge and an endless variety of attack strategies.

118.desc: A cute elf that assists against enemies while remaining hidden from sight.

119.desc: Passes judgment on enemies that are locked in coffins.

120.desc: The mysterious dance of this creature draws its enemies into eternal slumber.

121.desc: Frequently found sleeping, this monster is very dangerous when awakened.

122.desc: This dragon is conjured from a picture scroll to attack enemies. It has a pretty low defense factor.

123.desc: A vicious flower raised from polluted soil and fertilized by dark forces.

124.desc: An engine of destruction discovered in the ruins of an ancient civilization.

125.desc: A bird with a very long tail that attacks with a light that emanates from its entire being.

126.desc: A mysterious creature known as the king of warriors, but nobody has lived long enough to tell how it earned its reputation.

127.desc: A silent and swift warrior specializing in sneak attack.

128.desc: A sorcerer who lives on the moon and attacks opponents with the power of lunar light.

129.desc: A child-like creature that controls a sleep spirit to beckon enemies into eternal slumber.

130.desc: This monster is capable of manipulating the weather. This power is the reason behind the changing climate of mountains.

131.desc: A strange creature with the head of a fish and the tentacles of an octopus that attacks its enemies with spears.

132.desc: A zombie that suddenly appeared from plot #13 - supposedly an empty grave.

133.desc: A warrior protected by a shell that can even deflect the heat of burning flames.

134.desc: A mystical chain that is believed capable of binding its enemies and preventing their attacks.

135.desc: Long arms reach out from the Swamp of Chaos to drag in enemy creatures.

136.desc: Dressed in a night-black tuxedo, this creature presides over the doomed.

137.desc: Twisting the fabric of reality, arms stretch out from another dimension to attack opponents.

138.desc: A granite warrior with a dragon's soul wields a powerful sword against all enemies.

139.desc: A creature rumored to turn enemies into zombies with a strange ray that emanates from its eyes.

140.desc: Thousands of years old, this frog wizard attacks enemies with an army of tadpoles.

141.desc: Evolving from the powers of darkness, this snail has arms and legs that allow swift attacks against its enemies.

142.desc: Attacks enemies with fire-related spells, such as the "Sea of Flames" and the "Wall of Fire".

143.desc: The first in a line of golems that appears almost anywhere from within a dimensional ring.

144.desc: Controls the air currents to create violent winds and tornadoes to blow away its enemies.

145.desc: A flashy, black-caped thief who wields a magic cane.

146.desc: A weird temple of skulls and bones that sucks the living essence of all those who dare approach it.

147.desc: A warrior hidden within an egg that attacks enemies by flinging eggshells.

148.desc: A living shadow that dwells in the realm of darkness. It paralyzes its enemies to prevent attacks.

149.desc: A giant that appears from a mystic lamp and follows the orders of the lamp's owner.

150.desc: A mysterious creature that dwells below the sea.

151.desc: A warrior armed with the Sword of Crimson Flames. Uses fire to bind the movement of its enemies.

152.desc: A creature that melts into the earth, melds with an opponent's shadow, and attacks from below.

153.desc: A living spirit that preys on the living essence of enemies.

154.desc: A creature that deals out punishment with its flaming arrows.

155.desc: A fast-moving, bird-like creature that strangles an opposing monster with its long, thin arms.

156.desc: A living suit of armor that attacks enemies with a bone-jarring tackle.

157.desc: A fire-breathing plant found growing near volcanoes.

158.desc: Man-eating plant with poison feelers for attacking enemies.

159.desc: Coiling its serpent-like body, this creature spins and attacks with its snapping beak.

160.desc: Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior uses magnetism to block an enemy's escape.

161.desc: Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior is equipped with a tough, magnetically coated armor.

162.desc: A parasite brain that preys on the knowledge and intelligence of its opponents.

163.desc: An unusual creature with sapphire eyes that creates visions to confuse the enemy.

164.desc: A vile entity that deceives enemies into walking a path of destruction.

165.desc: The hand of final judgment is capable of intense attacks against the enemy.

166.desc: A puppet master that manipulates enemies during battle.

167.desc: A fragile jar from the past containing a mysterious creature.

168.desc: Scorching flames that wipe out enemies in the blink of an eye.

169.desc: King of the netherworld. It's said that he once had the power to rule over the Dark.

170.desc: A spirit that soothes the soul with the music of its glorious harp.

171.desc: This creature is covered with hypnotic eyes for mesmerizing its enemies.

172.desc: A strange warrior who manipulates three fearsome blades with both hands and its tail.

173.desc: This creature manipulates light to eliminate all traces of its appearance.

174.desc: A twister that runs rampant in the wastelands, cutting its enemies with blades of wind.

175.desc: Exiled from reality, this creature is adept at fighting in the dark.

176.desc: A winged eye enveloped in flames that attacks enemies with fire.

177.desc: A vicious turtle with a spiked shell.

178.desc: Stretching arms and razor-sharp claws make this monster a formidable opponent.

179.desc: A wizard that freezes an enemy's movement with a single curse.

180.desc: A maiden in the flower blossoms spreads poisonous pollen against opponents.

181.desc: Emits a dazzling light from its crystal to blind its enemies.

182.desc: A dancing warrior that makes mincemeat out of opponents with a sharp scythe.

183.desc: A thin and reedy creature protected by sacred power.

184.desc: Uses amazing sleight-of-hand to fool and destroy its enemies.

185.desc: This warrior confuses and destroys enemies by adopting their images.

186.desc: A bird-beast that summons reinforcements with a hand mirror.

187.desc: A creature with an abdominal portal used for summoning monsters from the netherworld.

188.desc: An ugly creature with two heads and a mouth for blasting laser beams.

189.desc: A monstrous cat with wings and a long, striking tail.

190.desc: A wizard whose incantations numb the senses of opposing monsters.

191.desc: Protected by thunder, this dangerous cloud attacks its enemies with acid rain.

192.desc: A small angel whose cuteness melts the hearts of its enemies.

193.desc: A tiger encased in a protective shell that attacks its enemies with its razor-sharp fangs.

194.desc: Know as a dweller of the swamps, this creature is a minion of the Dark forces.

195.desc: An unpredictable creature that splits into two and attacks an enemy from opposite directions.

196.desc: An ammonite warrior that has protected the seas from the dawn of time.

197.desc: A creature of the night that attacks enemies with its rocket-powered arms.

198.desc: A little angel that fires beams of happiness from the heart jewel on its forehead.

199.desc: A penguin-like creature that slides on its belly to deliver a blow with its outstretched sword.

200.desc: A very small dragon known for its vicious attacks.

201.desc: A savage beast that carries a big bamboo stick for beating down its enemies.

202.desc: A horned beaver with wings that throws high-velocity acorns from the sky with uncanny accuracy.

203.desc: Malicious spirits that walk the world of the living, unable to find their final resting place.

204.desc: A cannon-like monster that rapidly fires eyeballs at the enemy.

205.desc: An ugly, melting creature that breathes out poison gas.

206.desc: This creature swings its whip-like arms for mid-range attacks against enemies.

207.desc: With a battle cry that curdles the blood of its opponent, this creature attacks with its massive beak.

208.desc: A quick-moving and tiny angel that's very difficult to hit.

209.desc: This creature attacks by swinging around its sickle-like arms.

210.desc: An intensely hot flame creature that rams anything that stands in its way.

211.desc: This creature stores lightning within its body to deliver electrifying attacks.

212.desc: A huge monster with a single eye that fires an intence beam.

213.desc: A wizard of the waters that conjures a liquid wall to crush any enemies that oppose him.

214.desc: Serves as a double for the ruler of the Blue Flame. A master swordsman that wields a fine blade.

215.desc: A fiery spirit that burns anything in its path.

216.desc: A spirit of the forest protected by the surrounding plant life.

217.desc: A very rare creature created from the fusion of an uncommon beast and a vicious dragon.

218.desc: A dinosaur with two crushing jaws. Stores electricity in its horn and releases high voltage bolts from the mouth on its back.

219.desc: A beast-warrior that swings a massive scythe that draws on the spirit of its enemies to deliver devastating blows.

220.desc: A mysterious wizard whose face remains forever hidden behind a strange mask.

221.desc: A massive, intelligent spider that traps its enemies with webbing.

222.desc: A winged creature rumored to appear at midnight.

223.desc: A massive sea serpent that creates tidal waves to wipe out its enemies.

224.desc: A warrior that excels in laying traps such as a bottomless pit, for eternally ensnaring opponents.

225.desc: Few have escaped the curse of this creature. Those that have done so have gained untold power.

226.desc: Swift and vicious, this monster grabs its victim with its pincers and attacks the captive with its poison stinger.

227.desc: A vicious starfish that spits acid to melt away its enemies.

228.desc: A zombie that rose from the remains of the woodland ruler.

229.desc: A creature that allows power to be gained at the cost of life.

230.desc: An unusual and ferocious fish with the head of a beast.

231.desc: An unpleasantly smiling creature that wields a scythe to avoid enemy blows.

232.desc: A living weapon that fires projectiles from its mouth.

233.desc: A spirit said to dwell in the world of dreams. Attacks enemies in their sleep.

234.desc: A lovely swordmaster with some very agile moves.

235.desc: A warrior that has long resided in the forest and enjoys the protection of Mother Nature.

236.desc: A warrior that guards the entrance to the netherworld.

237.desc: An earthen doll that protects the treasure in the tombs of ancient kings.

238.desc: A palm tree with a will of its own that attacks enemies by flinging coconuts.

239.desc: A woman warrior that serves the forces of darkness.

240.desc: An eyeball creature with legs for jumping high and delivering finishing blows with its sharp claws.

241.desc: Armed with Psycho Sword, this sinister cutthroat rules the outer land.

242.desc: An opponent's fate is decided when the flames of each finger are extinguished.

243.desc: A water spirit that envelops its opponent in a thick fog to cover its attack.

244.desc: A monster borne from the lava pits. Generates intensive heat that can melt away its enemies.

245.desc: An eyeball fiend created by a servant of darkness. Uses "Dark Spheres" to blow away its enemies.

246.desc: A creature with a sword that gains its power from the life forces of its victims.

247.desc: An amphibian capable of calling up a massive tidal wave from the dark seas to wipe out enemy monsters.

248.desc: A fearsome duo consisting of a beast master and its loyal servant.

249.desc: Transforms the water overflowing from a jar into attacking dragons.

250.desc: An ice warrior whose slightest touch freezes an opponent.

251.desc: A beautiful mermaid that lures voyagers to a watery grave.

252.desc: A cat creature that looks cute to the eye but delivers scratching blows with its sharp claws.

253.desc: A creature that chose the path of sorcery to become a witch.

254.desc: A repulsive monster with a gaping belly that swallows almost anything.

255.desc: This monster is shielded by a hide covered in thick hair.

256.desc: A monster capable of creating dimensional rifts to trap its enemies.

257.desc: With a body armored by rock-hard fur, this monster features excellent defense capabilities.

258.desc: This creature changes the ground at its feet into quicksand to ensnare its enemies.

259.desc: A master fighter that uses various staffs to render enemies unconscious.

260.desc: A lovely moon goddess that can throw up a lunar curtain to block enemy attacks.

261.desc: A malevolent mirror that hypnotizes a beholder and renders the victim susceptible to attacks.

262.desc: An elf warrior mounted on a huge lizard.

263.desc: A stone golem that turns opponents into rocks and crushes them to dust.

264.desc: Hiding within its eggshell, this creature blocks enemy attacks with its massive wings.

265.desc: Grand King of the Seven Seas. Able to summon massive tidal waves to drown the enemy.

266.desc: A queen of swords that is virtually unequalled in her mastery of every blade imaginable to man.

267.desc: The speed of this warrior creates an intense vacuum that can actually slice through a monster's hide.

268.desc: A sorcerer that worships the dark forces and can summon a massive hand to drag away opponents into the netherworld.

269.desc: A lord of destruction born from the heart of darkness, this creature can summon storms to destroy opponents.

270.desc: A rain spirit that can summon typhoons to blow away its enemies.

271.desc: This creature's ominous eyes can unleash piercing rays against its enemies.

272.desc: Related to the phoenix, this creature dwells in the mountains. Its fiery breath is extremely scorching.

273.desc: Armed with a wealth of knowledge, this monster is able to block just about any attack.

274.desc: This youthful king of the forests lives in a green world, abundant with trees and wildlife.

275.desc: A land-based armored robot that is said to once have marine attack capabilities.

276.desc: The Sun and the North Wind join hands to deliver a devastating combination of heat and gale-force winds.

277.desc: A gorgon's egg with eyes said to create whatever creature crosses its view.

278.desc: Nobody has any idea what creature may spawn from this mysterious larva.

279.desc: A spectre that dwells in a blinding curtain of smoke.

280.desc: A creature that protects the king's throne from usurpers.

281.desc: Nothing can stop the mad attack of this powerful creature.

282.desc: A monstrous sheep with a long tail for hypnotizing enemies to render them powerless.

283.desc: A monster machine that generates images to confuse its enemies, making them prone to attacks.

284.desc: A magic-user that corrodes the yin and yang to create a twisted power to attack enemies.

285.desc: A snake with a single eye that blows an icy breath to freeze its opponents.

286.desc: An indestructible machine built to protect key entrances.

287.desc: An ogre possessed by the powers of the dark. Few can withstand its rapid charge.

288.desc: A demented artist that creates objets d'art to crush enemies.

289.desc: A shape-shifting slime that is capable of adopting the form of other creatures.

290.desc: A servant of the moon goddess, this warrior wields a pike with a spectacular crescent-shaped blade.

291.desc: A malevolent creature wrapped in flames that attacks enemies with intense fire.

292.desc: An amphibian with extrasensory powers for blocking attacks.

293.desc: Legendary swordmaster and a veteran of over 100 battles.

294.desc: A warrior equipped with equipment fashioned from dragon scales.

295.desc: A monstrous creature born from a failed lab experiment.

296.desc: This dragon wears a shield not only for its own protection but also for ramming its enemies.

297.desc: An unstoppable mechanical soldier powered by dark forces.

298.desc: A two-headed dragon with a pair of vicious jaws for crushing its enemies.

299.desc: A maiden that uses sound to her advantage. She wields a scythe that's shaped like a musical note.

300.desc: A vicious bird that attacks from the skies with its whip-like tail.

301.desc: A sword that brings out the best in warriors. It cannot be used by servants of the dark.

302.desc: Dark forces increase the power of Warriors!

303.desc: Dark forces increase the power of Fiends and other monsters of the Dark!

304.desc: Fiends and Beast-Warriors can constantly use their maximum strength!

305.desc: Arms Insects with a powerful laser!

306.desc: Allows Insects to fire an intense blast of fire!

307.desc: Increases the power of elves with mystical light!

308.desc: Increases the power of Beasts and other fanged monsters!

309.desc: Boosts the power of shelled monsters! Said to have no effect on those without shells.

310.desc: Vile microbes boost the power of Plants in the woods!

311.desc: This pendant grants extra power to Dark sorcerers!

312.desc: Silver bow and arrow enhances the power of Fairies.

313.desc: Increases the power of horned creatures! Has no effect on Dark monsters.

314.desc: Increases the power of Dark monsters with horns!

315.desc: A legendary treasure that increases the power of dragons.

316.desc: A whip for paralyzing enemies. Increases power when equipped with female creatures.

317.desc: Increases the power of female monsters by changing their attitudes.

318.desc: Creates two doppelgangers of Harpy Lady for three-pronged attacks!

319.desc: Moonlight increases the power of Beasts!

320.desc: Forces an opponent's monster card positioned for defense into the attack position.

321.desc: Diabolic forces act to increase the power of female and Dark monsters!

322.desc: Mystic forces from the crystal increase the power of Zombies.

323.desc: A magic book for increasing the power of magic-users. It cannot be used by bad-hearted sorcerers.

324.desc: Increases the power of Thunder, Rock, and Pyro monsters.

325.desc: A manufacturing facility that tunes up all Machine monsters.

326.desc: Absorbs the sun's energy to increase the power of Dinosaurs!

327.desc: The winds provide support to increase the power of Winged Beasts and other flying monsters!

328.desc: Poseidon's Strength is shared to boost the power of Aqua, Fish, and Sea Serpent monsters!

329.desc: Destroys all opponent Dragon monsters on the playfield!

330.desc: Changes the field in favor of Beast-Warrior, Insect, Plant, and Beast monsters!

331.desc: Changes the field in favor of Zombie, Dinosaur and Rock monsters!

332.desc: Changes the field in favor of Dragon, Winged Beast, and Thunder monsters!

333.desc: Changes the field to meadow land in favor of Warrior and Beast-Warrior monsters!

334.desc: Changes the field in favor of Aqua and Thunder monsters, but unfavorable to Machine and Pyro monsters!

335.desc: Changes the field in favor of Magic-User and Fiend monsters, but unfavorable to Fairy monsters!

336.desc: Sucks up every card in play on the field!

337.desc: Destroys every opposing monster with a stroke of lightning!

338.desc: A delicious beef curry increases Life Points by 200!

339.desc: A magic potion that increases Life Points by 500!

340.desc: A goblin's herb that increases Life Points by 1000!

341.desc: A fairy potion that increases Life Points by 2000!

342.desc: A mystical power that increases Life Points by 5000!

343.desc: A shower of sparks inflicts 50 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!!

344.desc: A fireball inflicts 100 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!!

345.desc: Flames inflict 200 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!!

346.desc: Flames inflict 500 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!

347.desc: An inferno inflicts 1000 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points!

348.desc: Enemy monsters are revealed and your opponent cannot attack for three turns.

349.desc: A curse reduces the power of all enemy monsters!

350.desc: A dazzling light reveals all monsters on the playing field.

351.desc: A monster that attacks anybody who attempts to open its lid.

352.desc: A lady swordsman that floats like a butterfly and stings like a bee.

353.desc: A finned creature distantly related to sea Dragons.

354.desc: A deceptively cute stuffed animal that bites.

355.desc: A cryptic doomsday machine that comes from the edge of the universe.

356.desc: A very vicious lion with sharp and long claws.

358.desc: A sacred dragon that burns away wickedness with its mystical flames.

359.desc: Bony and Tubby, a friendly pair of skeletons.

360.desc: A huge, brutal monster that attacks with razor-sharp claws.

361.desc: A rare penguin that flies with the wings on its head.

362.desc: A Millennium Item candidate that is said to block any powerful attack.

363.desc: Flies around spreading happiness to all.

364.desc: A powerful warrior with the same capabilities as the legendary Blue-eyes White Dragon.

365.desc: An arcane glass that draws its enemies into the mirror world.

366.desc: Walls appear on the field to form a labyrinth with no exit.

367.desc: A monster spider that dwells under the earth.

368.desc: A dangerous zombie that crawls in the dark.

369.desc: An unusually fast monster that sweeps across walls to attack its enemies.

370.desc: A tank that races around a labyrinth hunting down its enemies.

371.desc: A golem that uses lightning attacks similar to the Labyrinth Brothers.

372.desc: A golem that controls the winds like the Labyrinth Brothers.

373.desc: A golem that uses water attacks like the Labyrinth Brothers.

374.desc: Sanga, Kazejin, and Suijin join to form a single, powerful monster.

375.desc: Hidden under the floors of a labyrinth, it swallows any who pass above.

376.desc: A master of monsters that exercises control over several creatures.

377.desc: Ryu-kishin enhanced by the powers of darkness. Very sharp talons make it a worthy opponent.

378.desc: A monster formed by the vengeful souls of those who passed away in battle.

379.desc: A genie of the lamp that's at the beck and call of its master.

380.desc: The ultimate dragon formed by the fusion of three Blue-eyes White Dragons.

381.desc: An alligator monster straight from the cartoons.

382.desc: With an axe in each hand, this monster delivers heavy damage.

383.desc: A dragon from the cartoons that's more dangerous than it appears to be.

384.desc: A cartoon rabbit that quickly leaps all over the place, making it a difficult target.

385.desc: A jack-in-the-box that excels in surprise attacks.

386.desc: A favorite pet for harpies, but a very dangerous dragon.

387.desc: A lamp used by wizards to mix potions.

388.desc: A horrible torture machine with a large pendulum blade.

389.desc: Armed with a soul-searing spear, this creature favors magic attacks.

390.desc: A spider machine that launches explosive rockets against its enemies.

391.desc: A monster whose full potential can be achieved when transformed into its metal form.

392.desc: A metallic Zoa capable of intensive attacks.

393.desc: A sea creature that swallows enemies and slowly digests them.

394.desc: An iron-tailed monster equipped with very sharp scissors.

395.desc: An elf that dances across the sky with wings of razor-sharp blades.

396.desc: Frightening in appearance, this creature uses its large eyes and ears to keep track of any movement.

397.desc: Not a very powerful monster despite its large fangs and spikes.

398.desc: A monstrous bullfrog with poison spikes.

399.desc: An eastern warrior armed with a cursed sword.

401.desc: A bull monster resurrected by the dark arts that appears from inside a jar.

402.desc: A servant that maintains a close watch on anything and everything. It throws up a smokescreen when discovered.

403.desc: Huge monster with a lion's mane similar to the "King of Beasts".

404.desc: A fast-moving sea monster that has the bodies of a horse and a fish.

405.desc: A rampaging machine that wields a massive sword.

406.desc: A machine with several blades hidden within its square body.

407.desc: Armored with super alloy, this robot attacks with blasts of fire launched from both arms.

408.desc: This monster swings an earth-shaking axe that can eliminate enemies with a single blow.

409.desc: A golden, fire-breathing dragon that burns any opponent in its path.

410.desc: A spider-shaped, mechanized monster with sickles at the end of its legs.

411.desc: A mechanized bat that attacks by dropping explosion orbs.

412.desc: A wolf made entirely of iron. Its steel jaws can bite through anything.

413.desc: Round-shaped soldiers that roll around and act as guardians to the Machine King.

414.desc: Armed with a pair of shovels, this creature is a walking engine of destruction.

415.desc: A hunter that relentlessly pursues its target by order of the Machine King.

416.desc: Each separate part of this creature is an individual weapon capable of devastating attacks.

417.desc: A walking time device that loves to blow enemies away.

418.desc: A massive iron golem that appears from a dimensional rift.

419.desc: This creature swings around a huge spiked ball to destroy its enemies.

420.desc: Created in a basement lab, this infernal machine launches rockets from within its mouth.

421.desc: A strike force equipped with rader detectors and sensors.

422.desc: Created in an underground lab, this artificial being occasionally goes berserk.

423.desc: An armadillo-like creature that forms a die whenever it rolls up its body.

424.desc: A bird-like dragon with four bladed wings.

425.desc: A dragon that summons thunder and lightning to attack its opponents.

426.desc: With a body consisting entirely of rocks, this dragon flings boulders at its enemies.

427.desc: A very proud and powerful dragon emperor.

428.desc: Despite its weak strength, this creature is capable of casting spells to eliminate darkness.

429.desc: A shy goddess that seems to spend the majority of her time sleeping.

430.desc: This creature surrounds opponents with water and envelops them in a sweeping attack.

431.desc: A very aggressive mermaid with spikes for attacking enemies.

432.desc: A fairy that wanders the seas. Rumored to have the capabilities for summoning sea dragons.

433.desc: This elf is rumored to have lived for thousands of years. He leads an army of spirits against his enemies.

434.desc: A rare female magic-user armed with a vicious whip.

435.desc: A beautiful creature that flings icy arrows.

436.desc: A white, horned dolphin that attacks by calling up tidal waves.

437.desc: A violent shark that attacks anything in the sea.

438.desc: A steel fish armed with a sharp dorsal fin.

439.desc: A beautiful swimmer with a very nasty temperament.

440.desc: A rare rainbow fish that is almost impossible to catch.

441.desc: This creature carries a plasma cannon on its back.

442.desc: A dragon that dwells in the sea. It is capable of spitting high-pressure blasts of water.

443.desc: The king of the seas, this creature is protected by a solid shell and spits poisonous bubbles at its enemies.

444.desc: A strange, one-eyed monster armed with a dangerous spear.

445.desc: A merman warrior that attacks anyone who dares to pollute the sea.

446.desc: A creature that drowns its opponents by mesmerizing them with the ball on the end of its tail.

447.desc: A sea serpent that bites anything that passes nearby.

448.desc: Using the spikes sprouting from its body, this creature stabs its opponents and floods them with electricity.

449.desc: A massive and well-protected giant turtle that has lived over 30000 years.

450.desc: An amphibian sworn to avenge the death of its brothers.

451.desc: A crab monster with two massive scissors for cutting up enemies.

452.desc: A newly evolved crayfish with sharp scissors for clipping the enemy.

453.desc: A golem that has protected treasure for nearly a millennium.

454.desc: A golem with a massive right hand for crushing its victims.

455.desc: A monster that charges into enemies firing a pair of cannons mounted on its shoulders.

456.desc: A rock warrior that wields a very heavy sword carved from stone.

457.desc: A creature that erupts with anger, resulting in a crushing rain of boulders.

458.desc: A monster that judges wrong-doers and punishes them appropriately.

459.desc: This creature attacks enemies with electromagnetic waves.

460.desc: This creature spits a gooey substance that robs enemies of mobility and then stuns them with electric shocks.

461.desc: A monster with a pair of electric whips instead of arms.

462.desc: A creature that attacks enemies with thunderbolts.

463.desc: A serpent with a tail for storing electricity.

464.desc: A hunter of the skies that has never missed a target.

465.desc: A judge of the skies that delivers a sentence with its punishing silver-white claws.

466.desc: This monster swoops down and attacks with a rain of knives stored in its wings.

467.desc: A monster burning with crimson flames and capable of delivering a rain of sparks by flapping its wings.

468.desc: A creature that attacks its enemies with its large beak.

469.desc: A blue ninja that attacks with a large sickle and spiked feet.

470.desc: This creature casts a spell of terror and confusion just before attacking its enemies.

471.desc: This clown feeds the life force of its enemies to a monstrous lizard.

472.desc: A monster that suffocates its enemy by feeding on the surrounding air supply.

473.desc: A fiery warrior creature that unleashes intense heat from its body.

474.desc: A cruel monster that slices up enemies with its sharp claws.

475.desc: A flying poison snake that is not very good at maneuvering on the ground.

476.desc: A spider armed with scissors to attack anything that it traps in its web.

477.desc: A stag beetle monster with saw-toothed horn and arms.

478.desc: Insect soldiers that attack in swarms.

479.desc: A cockroach warrior that hides in small spaces and emerges to attack enemies.

480.desc: A violent stag beetle with a razor-like cutter.

481.desc: A clever mouse with a sharpened left claw.

482.desc: A very dangerous monster with spikes on its head and tail.

483.desc: A malevolent creature that resembles a winged lion.

484.desc: A monster that envelops an enemy and slowly digests it.

485.desc: This creature rolls massive objects to crush its enemies.

486.desc: A book wizard with page after page of potent spells.

487.desc: A beast covered in flowers from head to toe.

488.desc: A flower creature with rainbow-colored blossoms that lure an enemy into its waiting jaws.

489.desc: A dangerous flower that fires pollen projectiles.

490.desc: A ball covered in sharp needles. Usually rains down on enemies in a group.

491.desc: A beautiful peacock- like creature that fires its feathers at opponents.

492.desc: Trailed by a beautiful tail, this shooting star inflicts damage when it hits an enemy.

493.desc: A wizard dressed in blue who is usually found meditating.

494.desc: An unusual mermaid that appears whenever a rainbow bridges the sky.

495.desc: A fantastic guitar player that attacks enemies with ultrasonic emissions.

496.desc: A ferocious rabbit with sharp claws.

497.desc: A hermit crab with the head of a dragon.

498.desc: A strange fiend with long arms and razor-sharp talons.

499.desc: Attacks by blowing webs at its enemies. Nobody knows what the final form of this insect might be.

500.desc: A fearsome monster sent from the netherworld to destroy dragons.

501.desc: A creature that slices and dices with its scissors and feeds off its victims.

502.desc: Gifted with the power of dragons, this warrior wields a sword created from a dragon's fang.

503.desc: A fox-like creature with a protective shell.

504.desc: A monster that leaks acid from its pores to melt anything that touches its skin.

505.desc: A clear crystal that focuses light to create a powerful laser beam.

506.desc: A huge moth that generates a whirlwind containing poison dust.

507.desc: A flying fish with a sharp head for piercing targets.

508.desc: A mechanical dinosaur equipped with a beam cannon.

509.desc: A colossal dinosaur that stomps on anything that wanders into its path.

510.desc: A laughing flower whose chuckles can drive an enemy mad.

511.desc: A plant warrior that attacks with a combination of sword-swings and pea projectiles.

512.desc: A highly destructive machine armed with a powerful cannon.

513.desc: A sentry robot armed with homing rockets for guarding throne rooms from intruders.

514.desc: A creature capable of manipulating several scissors with definite results.

515.desc: A massive stone idol from Easter Island that fires laser rings from its mouth.

516.desc: A monster that angers an opponent to the point that the enemy goes berserk.

517.desc: Appears from underground and attacks with long, snake-like tentacles.

518.desc: A stone turtle with a very high defense factor.

519.desc: A fiery squid that can maintain its flames underwater.

520.desc: A rare flying turtle that inhabits the sea.

521.desc: The breath from this bird robs creatures of their life force.

522.desc: A huge bird known for its sharp dive attacks.

523.desc: Defeated enemies serve as ingredients for this gourmet monster.

524.desc: An extraterrestrial life form that loves living in water.

525.desc: Music from this creature's flute can drain an enemy's willpower.

526.desc: Armed with a huge sickle, this monster can fire beams from its large eyes.

527.desc: Often mistaken as a cute pet, this creature is a very dangerous beast.

528.desc: A very fast monster that rolls up and rams its enemies.

529.desc: A flaming beast that is lethal to the touch.

530.desc: Uses a wand to cast various spells against an enemy.

531.desc: Turns enemies to stone and crushes them to dust.

532.desc: Elf twins that attack an enemy from opposite sides.

533.desc: An insect monster with the jaws of a stag beetle and the horn of a beetle.

534.desc: A monster with four highly dexterous arms for executing separate attacks.

535.desc: A man-shaped mantis with two razor-sharp scythes.

536.desc: A chameleon-like monster that can hide anywhere by changing colors.

537.desc: Rolls along the ground releasing bolts of electricity to attack its enemies.

538.desc: Swallows enemies whole and uses their essence as energy.

539.desc: A zombie shark that wanders the ocean depths, cursing any that dare cross its path.

540.desc: A phantom fairy that fires countless arrows at anything that harbors an urge to attack.

541.desc: This creature blocks enemy movement with gale-force winds and attacks with a massive battle axe.

542.desc: A rocket-launching fish protected by thorny spikes.

543.desc: This creature is powered by the life force of the fishes it captures with its long tongue.

544.desc: A highly accurate mechanical monster covered with large- caliber cannons.

545.desc: A skeletal zombie dragon that is capable of flying across the skies.

546.desc: A massive beast of a fish with arms, legs, and razor-sharp teeth.

547.desc: This monster spins about its enemy launching blinding leaves and painful seeds.

548.desc: A zombie rat that hunts felines.

549.desc: A slime creature with a frog's head that croaks as it attacks.

550.desc: A strange sea serpent with a massive mouth lined with huge fangs.

551.desc: A wicked elf that just loves to engage in battle.

552.desc: Creates powerful tornadoes with its huge wings.

553.desc: A fully grown Mushroom Man with an increased attack factor.

554.desc: This brother of Swamp Battleguard may not be powerful, but is pretty good on defense.

555.desc: A crimson dragon that spits fireballs at its enemies.

556.desc: A monster that aimlessly wanders in search of enemies.

557.desc: A steel idol worshipped in the Land of Machines.

558.desc: A not very reliable sorcerer's servant.

559.desc: A strange warrior from another dimension.

560.desc: A creature that came from another galaxy.

561.desc: A low-class, minor dragon incapable of breathing fire.

562.desc: A larva with steel spikes to attack the unwary.

563.desc: A harmless creature usually found in the attic of any home.

564.desc: A very unusual skeletal zombie elephant with glowing gold bones.

565.desc: A black shark that can detect almost any scent in the water.

566.desc: A very long snake that often appears in legends and myths.

567.desc: A thorny plant found in the darklands that wraps itself around any unwary traveler.

568.desc: Man-like dinosaur lacking in strength, but with a high I.Q.

569.desc: A blood-sucking snake in human form that attacks any living being that passes nearby.

570.desc: A tiger-striped dragon that is often seen racing across the wasteland with tremendous speed.

571.desc: A jet-black dragon that inhabits the jungles and feeds on trees.

572.desc: Empress of the Golden Kingdom. None may refuse her will.

573.desc: A very ferocious monster spawned from a T-Rex.

574.desc: This forest-dwelling witch can see all with the eye on her forehead.

575.desc: A white goat that has inhabited the forest for ages. The creature is actually an elder of the woods.

576.desc: A rare scarlet scorpion that can be found in the tundra -- not in the desert.

577.desc: A very wise, long-nosed goblin with supernatural powers.

578.desc: A wizard with a black cape that is actually a talking lion disguised as a man.

579.desc: A rare flower that blooms in a pitch-dark abyss.

580.desc: A cutting-edge robot that eliminates intruders upon detection.

581.desc: This bird is a precursor to disaster!!

582.desc: A popular creature in mythology that delivers judgement with a sharp spear.

583.desc: This creature is known to predict the weather with very little accuracy.

584.desc: This creature corners its enemies and seals away their power.

585.desc: A mechanically enhanced snail that is no faster than it used to be.

586.desc: A creature that transforms into the image of its enemy and copies every offensive move.

587.desc: A highly evolved Larvas that is even more powerful than before.

588.desc: A living vase that blinds enemies with pollen and attacks with its sharp teeth.

589.desc: Attacks a nearby opponent by reaching out with its blue vines.

590.desc: Wraps its coils around opponents and pecks them with its huge beak.

591.desc: A large jar that attacks nearby enemies by unleashing the monster it contains inside.

592.desc: A fairy of the arts and an excellent harp player.

593.desc: A monster turtle with a crimson shell. It feeds on fire.

594.desc: A red rose possessed by a vile spirit that feeds on the life force of others to provide the flower with nourishment.

595.desc: Drags enemies into a mirror world.

596.desc: A monster that can eat all it wants but is never fulfilled.

597.desc: With skin tinged a bluish white, this strange creature is a fearsome sight to behold.

598.desc: A monster created from an experimental attempt to graft wings on beasts.

599.desc: A monster capable of bringing on sudden rain showers.

600.desc: Seals away the good in a soul to create a wicked being.

601.desc: A cute fairy dedicated to bringing about eternal love.

602.desc: A low-class penguin soldier that attacks in a group.

603.desc: A beautiful and powerful dragon fairy.

604.desc: An ill-mannered field mouse that chews on anything.

605.desc: A liquid life form that moves freely in water.

606.desc: An undersea creature that attacks with two whip-like tails.

607.desc: A monster with a massive maw that allows it to swallow an enemy whole.

609.desc: A monster fly that swoops down with sharp sword-like arms extended out front.

610.desc: A lizard that discharges electricity stored in its body.

611.desc: A servant of fiends used primarily for scouting an area.

612.desc: Soothes the souls of others by chanting a mysterious spell.

613.desc: A two-headed Thunder Dragon capable of powerful electric attacks.

614.desc: A hunter that uses its spider web to entrap its enemies.

615.desc: A bluish starfish with a solid hide capable of fending off attacks.

616.desc: A fairy that controls the feelings of others, instilling them with bravery.

617.desc: A sea creature with sharp teeth that won't release a victim once they're locked on.

618.desc: A lady warrior drenched in the essence from a thousand battlefields.

619.desc: A clay idol representing a rock spirit. The creature has significant attack and defense factors.

620.desc: A creature made up of several snakes that attack separately in battle.

621.desc: A vile warrior wizard adept at casting doom-dealing spells.

622.desc: Controls air currents and can generate a sudden gust of wind to blow away an opponent.

623.desc: The appearance of this creature is preceded by the ground melting under an opponent's feet.

624.desc: An amphibian warrior that can easily navigate beneath the waters.

625.desc: A fairy dedicated to protecting fountains from pollution.

626.desc: A mermaid sentry serving the Sea King and his kingdom.

627.desc: This fast creature can easily elude enemy attacks and counter them with its vicious claws.

628.desc: An inexperienced witch who just started learning the mystic arts.

629.desc: A rat that is protected by armor-like fur.

631.desc: A lunar sorcerer that uses mystical spells to induce hallucinations.

632.desc: A rock giant consisting of massive boulders.

634.desc: A green-scaled lizard warrior dedicated to protecting the sea.

635.desc: Not very useful double of a queen.

636.desc: A bird that glows with blue flames and has a head of hair shaped like a crown.

637.desc: A protector of the forest, this massive tree continues to grow.

638.desc: Queen of the Tree Spirit who is embraced by brilliant autumn leaves.

639.desc: A Bugroth unit modified for underwater warfare.

640.desc: A gigantic caterpillar that spits acid capable of melting almost anything.

641.desc: A scheming queen who covets the king's throne during his absence.

642.desc: A black-haired sheep that is capable of sorcery.

643.desc: A creature that hides in a saucer and appears only to attack enemies.

645.desc: Mechanical soldier with a mind of its own. Originally created to protect members of the royal family.

646.desc: Looks like any other slime, but definitely much more powerful!

647.desc: This amphibian creature boasts a high attack factor, but not much of one for defense.

648.desc: A machine designed to blitz its enemies.

649.desc: Confuses enemy monsters with noise that is harsh to the ears.

650.desc: Attacks from the skies with a whip-like tail.

651.desc: A boomerang featuring the effects of two cards: the Legendary Sword and the Sword of Dark Destruction.

652.desc: A card for boosting the power of the Labyrinth Wall.

653.desc: Destroys all opponent Warrior cards played on the field.

654.desc: Increases the strength of those who control the power of Salamandra.

655.desc: Cancels the magic over all level-reduced monsters and sets them at level 0.

657.desc: A card that increases the power of any selected monster by 2 levels.

658.desc: A card that changes any selected monster to a Machine monster.

659.desc: A horn that increases the power of Fairy creatures.

660.desc: Acid rain destroys an opponent's Machine monsters.

661.desc: Opponent monsters in play with attack factors of 1500 or more are eliminated.

662.desc: An insecticide for wiping out an opponent's Insect monsters that are currently in play.

663.desc: A magic wind that reduces to rubble an opponent's Rock monsters that are currently in play.

664.desc: A blast of heat dries up and eliminates an opponent's Fish monsters that are currently in play.

665.desc: Sacrifices the monster with the highest defense rating and summons Shield.

666.desc: Sacrifices Beast-Warrior, Dragon, and Pyro monsters to summon Yamadron.

667.desc: Sacrifices Kazejin, Suijin, and Sanga of the Thunder to summon Gate Guardian.

668.desc: A glaring light that increases the power of all monsters.

669.desc: Decreases an opponent's in-play monsters by two levels.

670.desc: Ceremony conducted to summon Black Luster Soldier. Sacrifice required.

671.desc: Ceremony conducted to summon Zera. Sacrifice required.

672.desc: Destroys all opponent Magic cards that are in play.

673.desc: Ceremony conducted to summon War Lion. Sacrifice required.

674.desc: Ceremony conducted to summon Fiend's Mirror. Sacrifice required.

675.desc: Sacrifice three Blue-eyes to summon Ultimate Dragon.

676.desc: Sacrifice Dancer and Warrior to summon Performance of Sword.

677.desc: A card with the ingredients for making a delicious hamburger.

678.desc: Sacrifice Beast-Warrior and Golem to summon Sengenjin.

679.desc: Sacrifice Warrior and Scythe Wielder to summon Skull Guardian.

680.desc: Sacrifice a horned monster to summon Tri-Horned Dragon.

681.desc: Monsters with Attack Factors of 500 or lower are eliminated from the play field.

682.desc: Monsters with Attack Factors of 1000 or lower are eliminated from the play field.

683.desc: When an opposing monster's Attack Factor is 1500 or lower, it is eliminated from the play field.

684.desc: When an opposing monster's Attack Factor is 2000 or lower, it is eliminated from the play field.

685.desc: When an opposing monster's Attack Factor is 3000 or lower, it is eliminated from the play field.

686.desc: When an opponent's monster attacks, it is blown to smithereens and eliminated from the play field.

687.desc: Reflects the damage of direct attack cards like Fire Sparks and Inferno back to your opponent.

688.desc: A card that reverses the effects of recovery cards and transforms the points to damage.

689.desc: A card that reverses the effects of power-up cards and transforms the effects to power reduction.

690.desc: A trap card for tricking your opponent. Nothing happens when it is attacked.

691.desc: Select a specific monster for sacrifice and summon Serpent Night Dragon.

692.desc: Sacrifice crab and turtle to summon Crab Turtle.

693.desc: Sacrifice a masked one to summon a new mask.

694.desc: Sacrifice 3 Fiend monsters to conduct the ritual for the Resurrection of Chakra.

695.desc: Sacrifice Puppeteer and Machine monsters to summon the Puppet.

696.desc: Sacrifice the stag beetle and beetle to summon Javelin Beetle.

697.desc: Sacrifice the Ashura's Arm and Sword-wielder to summon.

698.desc: Sacrifice a normal Queen to summon Cosmo Queen.

699.desc: Sacrifice Temple and Cockroach to summon Dokurorider.

700.desc: Sacrifice Horn and Machine Fish to summon Sea Fortress.

701.desc: A warrior dancer with fancy dance steps.

702.desc: Attracts hungry enemies with tasty aromas and eats them when they get close enough.

703.desc: A headstrong, primitive man equipped with a Millennium Item.

704.desc: A guardian of the law that doesn't forgive cheating. Attacks enemies with its sword-like arms.

705.desc: A wicked dragon with three horns protruding from its head.

706.desc: A dragon created from the soul of a wicked knight.

707.desc: A monk who has conducted several rituals in the netherworld, and who is capable of using both weapons and magic.

708.desc: A queen who rules over all the stars in the universe.

709.desc: A twisting shape that attacks with tentacle-like arms.

710.desc: A creature with a turtle shell and crab scissors to provide high attack and defense factors.

711.desc: A dragon warrior armed with a crescent-shaped sword. Rumored to be from the moon.

712.desc: A dragon that arrived on earth by means of a comet that fell from the far reaches of space.

713.desc: With the burning hide of a meteorite, this creature vaporizes all that it touches.

714.desc: A heavenly stallion that flies across the skies on scarlet wings.

715.desc: A mysterious doll with a strange dance that robs the power of opposing monsters.

716.desc: A skilled warrior that wields six swords against opposing monsters.

717.desc: A creature with lethal scissors that cut through almost anything.

718.desc: A sea monster with a cannon mounted on its back to blow its enemies out of the water.

719.desc: A lonely rider that races across the wasteland, raising thick clouds of dust.

720.desc: A creature that twists the fabric of light and darkness to generate images to confuse opponents.

721.desc: Ceremony for summoning the Magician of Black Chaos. Sacrifice required.

722.desc: The ultimate magic-user, who wields the power of chaos borne from the fusion of Dark and Light.

001.desc: An extremely rare card with unsurpassed attack and defense power.

002.desc: A delicate elf that lacks in offense but has a terrific defense backed by mystical power.

003.desc: A one-eyed behemoth with thick, powerful arms made for delivering punishing blows.

004.desc: Much more than just a child, this dragon is gifted with untapped power.

005.desc: A very elusive creature that looks like a harmless statue until it attacks.

006.desc: A playful little imp that lurks in the dark, waiting to attack an unwary enemy.

007.desc: A dragon commonly found guarding mountain fortresses. Its signature attack is a sweeping dive from out of the blue.

008.desc: Found in moist areas, this monster launches poison spores against its enemies.

009.desc: Ghostly beast that appears in the wasteland and is particularly troublesome when faced in large numbers.

010.desc: A dragon that dwells in the depths of darkness. Its defensive capability suffers from its poor eyesight.

011.desc: With a body covered in sword-like thorns, nothing dares stand in the way of this monster when it charges.

012.desc: This creature is armed with a spiked club that can destroy almost anything in its path. Rumored to have a brother that is just as destructive.

013.desc: Capable of firing cannonballs from its mouth for long-range attacks against enemies.

014.desc: A bull monster often found in the woods. Charges enemy monsters with a pair of razor-sharp horns.

015.desc: A fighter gifted with the power of fire. Attacks enemies with a sword that launches flames.

016.desc: A sorcerer capable of bending time to his will. Though not powerful at first glance, appearances can be deceiving.

017.desc: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

018.desc: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

019.desc: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

020.desc: A forbidden limb sealed by magic. Whoever breaks this seal will know infinite power. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

021.desc: Once combined with arms and legs, this monster is freed from its magical chains. Only one card of this type may be included in a deck.

022.desc: An entity with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the FIEND class of monsters, this is a pretty rare card.

023.desc: A monster worm created by the powers of darkness. It suddenly appears from under the ground to attack its enemies.

024.desc: A skeletal ghost that isn't strong but can mean trouble in large numbers.

025.desc: A small imp that dwells in the dark. Its single horn makes it a formidable opponent.

026.desc: A monster with tremendous power. Destroys enemies with a swing of its axe.

027.desc: What this creature lacks in size, it makes up for in defense when battling in the meadow.

028.desc: Protected by a solid body of rock, this creature throws a bone-shattering punch.

029.desc: A solid warrior that can move swiftly over rough terrain.

030.desc: A deceptively fragile-looking skeleton warrior that is known for its swift and precise attacks.

031.desc: A vicious, fire-breathing dragon whose wicked flames corrupt the souls of its victims.

032.desc: An unusual and rarely seen two-headed dragon.

033.desc: For this club-wielding warrior, there is no other outcome to battle than victory or defeat.

034.desc: This clown appears out of nowhere and executes some very strange moves to avoid enemy attacks.

035.desc: The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.

036.desc: A monster with the head of a poisonus snake. One look will turn an unwary opponent to stone.

037.desc: A warrior's prowess combines with a dragon's speed to create a powerful offensive force.

038.desc: A knight mounted on a horse that travels faster than the wind. His battle charge is a force to be reckoned with.

039.desc: A wicked dragon that taps dark forces to execute a powerful attack.

040.desc: A jar carved with strange patterns. It has a particularly high defense factor.

041.desc: An elf, who learned to wield a sword, baffles enemies with lightning-swift attacks.

042.desc: Manipulates enemy attacks with the power of illusion. A very rare card.

043.desc: A very average-looking fighter with an unusually high attack factor.

044.desc: A unique doll gifted with mystical power. Particularly powerful when attacking against dark forces.

046.desc: This creature's tough hide deflects just about any attack.

047.desc: Not as tough as it looks in terms of defense. This monster's sharp horn gives it an edge when attacking.

048.desc: A compact, three-eyed monster that is dangerous when faced in the dark.

049.desc: A giant ant that dwells in the jungle. Powerful in terms of both ATK and DEF factors.

050.desc: Usually found travelling in swarms, this creature's ideal environment is the forest.

051.desc: A lizard with a very tough hide and a very vicious bite.

052.desc: A massive beetle with a tough hide and a dangerous horn.

053.desc: A huge bee with exceptional strength. Particularly dangerous when a swarm is encountered.

054.desc: A large, spherical roach that attacks its enemies by rolling over them. Its tough defense makes it a formidable foe.

055.desc: A giant blood-sucking flea that's devastating when attacking.

056.desc: Not much in its larval form, this creature is a force to be reckoned with when it grows to become a colossal moth.

057.desc: A powerful creature of the forest, this huge moth attacks its enemies by spreading poison dust with its wings.

058.desc: By itself, this small creature may not seem like much. But in the dark, it attacks in numbers as a formidable force.

059.desc: A mammoth that protects the gravesite of its pack. It's absolutely merciless when facing graverobbers.

060.desc: A giant white shark with razor-sharp teeth.

061.desc: A rarely seen wolf with a powerful nose for catching the scent of an enemy.

062.desc: A human-shaped animal with wings. Beautiful to watch, but lethal when engaged in battle.

063.desc: Three fierce sisters who relentlessly attack as a team.

064.desc: A fast and powerful axe-wielding beast warrior.

065.desc: A snow wolf that's beautiful to the eye but absolutely vicious in battle.

066.desc: A man-hunter with powerful arms that can crush boulders.

067.desc: The final incarnation of the ultimate insect, the Great Moth!

068.desc: An axe-swinging beast warrior with the head of a dragon.

069.desc: A dragon that has grown and developed over a thousand years.

070.desc: A massive squid that suddenly appears from the depths of the sea to attack unwary enemies.

071.desc: An almost invisible, semi-transparent jellyfish that drifts in the sea.

072.desc: This creature is capable of instantly evolving larvae into adults.

073.desc: A sea dragon that's referred to as the "King of the Ocean". It attacks its enemies with huge tidal waves.

074.desc: A giant warrior made of stone. A punch from this creature has earth-shaking results.

075.desc: A meat-eating plant that is attractive to the eye but dangerous when approached.

076.desc: A vicious crocodile with intelligence. Hard scales form a natural armor for this creature.

077.desc: A devious snake with a thick body that wraps around an enemy monster and squeezes the life out of it.

078.desc: An axe-wielding monster of tremendous strength and agility.

079.desc: Nothing stands in the way of this spike-covered dinosaur.

080.desc: Fast on its feet, this dinosaur rips enemies to shreds with its sharp claws.

081.desc: A powerful dragon with teeth that can grind almost anything to dust.

082.desc: A very rare card with a high-level ATK factor.

083.desc: A creature that can generate darkness to envelop all that exists around it.

084.desc: This monster boasts a strong defense and a massive scythe that cuts through almost anything.

085.desc: Wields the power of darkness to destroy its enemies.

086.desc: This creature flies through the dark, attacking its enemies with its long, hairy arms.

087.desc: A fire-breathing monster that dwells in the netherworld.

088.desc: A fiend guarding the treasures of the netherworld. Its defense is particularly high in a dark environment.

089.desc: Well-protected by its shell, this monster flings projectiles from its catapult.

090.desc: Uses her mystical power to protect the weak and provide spiritual support.

091.desc: Half man and half horse, this monster is known for its extreme speed.

092.desc: A powerful and unstoppable combination of bull and horse.

093.desc: Prefers to face enemies one-on-one. His swiftly drawn blade delivers a quick and immediate finnish.

094.desc: A weakened dragon that can no longer fly, but is still a formidable force to be reckoned with.

095.desc: A performer in the Dark Circus, this clown drains the strength of its enemies with strange dances.

096.desc: A warrior raised from the beyond. Blindly swings a sharp blade with devastating force.

097.desc: A dragon revived by sorcery. Its breath is highly corrosive.

098.desc: A clown revived by the powers of darkness. Its strange dance has sent many monsters to their ends.

099.desc: This pumpkin king strikes at its enemies with its long tentacles.
